text.title: mr-codemod-refactor-agent Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for mr-codemod-refactor-agent as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Bundling two unrelated framework upgrades into one PR because "they're both migrations".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: If one half regresses, the only revert path is the whole PR; you lose the bisect granularity that codemod-per-PR was designed to give.

failure-mode.description: Hand-editing files inside a codemod PR after the codemod ran.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Breaks idempotence — a re-run regenerates the original; the manual edit is silently dropped on the next migration.
